title: AWS Bedrock Converse API Deep Dive

timeline.label: Introduction
timeline.text: Overview of the session. Why the new Converse API replaces the legacy InvokeModel endpoints.

timeline.label: Converse Payload Details
timeline.text: Structuring the system prompt arrays, user messages, assistant responses, and inference configuration objects.

timeline.label: Streaming Mode Implementation
timeline.text: Writing converse_stream async iterations in Python to stream token blocks back to a client UI.

timeline.label: Multi-Model Benchmarks
timeline.text: Testing the same payload against Anthropic Claude 3 Haiku, Sonnet, and Amazon Nova Light to compare response times.

timeline.label: Summary & Best Practices
timeline.text: Handling client exceptions, exponential backoffs for throttling, and setting token limits.
